steps.t: Ashenfell's paw prints can be found in the hills east of Nobottle. Diamond has asked you to track the lynx, Ashenfell, back to her den.
Ashenfell's paw prints can be found in the hills east of Nobottle. Diamond has asked you to track the lynx, Ashenfell, back to her den.
Diamond is near Ashenfell's den, outside of Nobottle. Diamond is waiting to speak with you.
Ashenfell's den is east of Nobottle. Diamond has asked you to place flags about the lynx's den to warn folk away from the site.
Diamond is near Ashenfell's den, outside of Nobottle. Diamond is waiting to speak with you.
Townsfolk can be found in and around Nobottle. Adamanda has asked you to help get the word out about the lynx's den.
Diamond is in Nobottle. Diamond is waiting to speak with you.
